problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Nanoparticle. Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
